name: sap-project
description: SAP project-delivery & operations automation for functional consultants, integration, security, release, and AMS/ops teams. Ships the test-data creation family today — Business Partner (BP), Material Master (MM01/MM02/MM03), and Sales Order (VA01/VA02/VA03) — and is the successor home for the former sap-tcd plugin. Expanding across the roadmap to authorizations & roles, incident & interface diagnosis (IDoc/RFC/output), release & transport management, config compare, and testing. Companion to sap-dev-core (install that first — its shared scripts are resolved at runtime).
